EXAMPLE 1: 

A patient with atherosclerotic heart disease with congestive heart failure requires 
observation by skilled nursing personnel for signs of decompensation or adverse effects 
resulting from newly prescribed medication. Skilled observation is needed to determine 
whether the new drug regimen should be modified or whether other therapeutic measures 
should be considered until the patient's clinical condition and/or treatment regimen has
